target: 9. Island Stroll
Koyumiba-san, I'm sorry to keep you waiting.
I'm sorry, I got held up with the preparations.

No, don't worry about it.
It's my fault for coming so suddenly.
No way, it was so sudden, I was shocked.

I'm sorry, I'm sorry.
I actually wanted to ask you something
before we left…
You wanted to ask me something?

I thought I should wait until I was calmer,
but I have to go back to Tokyo right after the festival
because of my own schedule…

It's all my own selfishness,
I'm really sorry about that--

I wanted to greet Alan-san
and also… Ushio.

Ah, okay, thanks.
Alan's already at the store, let's go see him.
Yeah…
Good morning, Alan.

Good morning.
You're going out with Mio too?
Ah, that's right, but…
Ah, good morning.

Ah, good morning.
Is this your friend, Shinpei and Mio?

Ah, this girl
is Koyumiba-san, who went to the same elementary school as me and Ushio.
She's back on the island after seven years.

I'm sorry for disturbing you during your busy time.
I'm Kaori Koyumiba.

Ah, Koyumiba-san! 
Thank you so much for the courtesy.

I'm Alan, her father.
I own this Western-style cafe.

Yes, I remember!
When I lived on this island,
my parents and I used to come here to eat.

Haha, that's right.
I remember that too.

Really?!
That makes me so happy…
Mio, are you three going out now?

Yeah, but before that,
Kaori wanted to visit her sister…

Ah… I wanted to offer incense to Ushio.
Is that okay?

Ah, of course.
Ushio would be happy too.
Mio, can you show her the way?
Yeah.

Thank you.
I'll be a bother.

Koyumiba-san and this girl…
You've really grown up nicely.
She's been doing idol activities in Tokyo.

Wow, really?!
That's amazing.

I was asked to be your guide
to show you the island's famous spots.
After this, I'll go with Mio.

Ah, go ahead.
Don't worry about the store.

Thanks.
Ah, but before that, I might want to talk to Alan.
Talk? What talk?

Koyumiba-san's doing a talk show
at the festival about Hitogashima.

Because of that, she's planning to visit
the island's famous spots.
I'll be asking people along the way.
So, you're starting with me?
Oh no… What should I talk about?!

She said she wanted to hear your voice,
so just answer casually.

(I'm sure Koyumiba-san really wanted to
offer incense to Ushio…)

(After talking to Alan,
I'm touring the island's famous spots
with Koyumiba-san's requests in mind…)

Wow, there's a spot
where you can have the view all to yourself?
That's amazing!

That's right.
It's a secret from others!

Thank you!
It seems like there are
quite a few hidden spots only locals know about.
Note, note…

That's what I wanted to hear.
It was a good idea to approach you.

Haha…
Feel free to come anytime.

Yes!
Thank you very much!
Hmm…

…Sorry!
Can I ask you a question?
You're a bit different from the Kaori I knew before…
Ah, that's the idol mode.

Actually, I wanted to learn more about this island,
so I've been asking locals about it…

But… isn't that amazing?
So energetic, you know?

Ah, right…
Did I really need to come along?

Well, for now,
there's not much we can do…
Ah, Shinpei-kun!
Whoa!?

What's with the report yesterday!?
It was all a lie, wasn't it!?
Ah, that was…

Tetsu-san, hello!
Are you selling oil again?

Don't say such a harsh thing with that smile.
I'm working properly now.
You can see the patrol, can't you?

Huh, Tetsu-san, going on patrol in this heat?
That's rare.
Was something wrong?

Ah, that's right.
I got a report from Shiomi just now--

Shinpei-kun, Mio-chan!
I'm sorry I'm late.
What, you weren't with Mio-chan?

Ah, hello.
Are you the police officer?

Ah, that's right.
The Hero of Justice… that thing?

This is Tetsu-san.
He's the police officer who calls himself the Hero of Justice.
Tetsu-san… I remember now.

Nice to meet you, Tetsu-san.
I'm Kaori.
Please take care of me!
Idol mode.
Mio, shut up…

Kaori, you seem to have
gotten a lot of information.

Yeah!
I've taken thorough notes.
Ah, that's good.

By the way, Tetsu-san,
you just stood there in silence after Kaori greeted you.
That's rude, isn't it?
C-c-come on… here, here, here, here…

Shin-chan, what should we do?
Tetsu-san's gone crazy.
Ah, Tetsu-san?
Y-you! You're Koyumiba!

Ah, yes.
Did you know me?
I know you, I'm a huge fan!

Haha, it's really you!
Why is such a popular idol
coming to such a remote place?!

Actually, I'm from Hitogashima,
and I'm visiting my hometown now.

I wanted to learn more about the island
I haven't been to in a while,
so I'm having Shinpei-kun show me around.

H-hometown in Hitogashima…?
Shinpei-kun's classmate…?

M-maybe it's true…!
This is a chance!
Y-yeah… take it…!
(Why is he suddenly tidying up?!)
Nice to meet you, Koyumiba.

I'm Tetsu, the only police officer
on this island, or rather,
the Hero of Justice.
Please take care of me.
Haha, nice to meet you, Hero of Justice.

It makes me feel safe
knowing that my hometown is protected
by someone like you, the Hero of Justice.

Hahahaha!
What a nice thing to say!

Leave it to me!
If there's a Hero of Justice like me,
this island will be safe!

Something about his movements feels
a bit too exaggerated.
He's trying too hard to look cool…
I'll let you see Koyumiba's activities!

Not just on TV, but magazines, radio, and the internet!
She's getting a lot of attention everywhere!
Wow, that makes me happy!

Ah, right!
Sign!
Sign this notebook!
That's a work notebook, isn't it?

Mio, remember this.
There are many important things
more important than work in the world.
Even if he says that with that smug face…

It was great talking to you, Tetsu-san.
You let me do an interview…
Thank you so much.

I should be thanking you!
It was a dream come true!
I'll treasure this signature!
Well, I'm off!
Please work hard!

(Seeing Koyumiba-san's fan service
like this makes me realize she's really an idol)

(It's like she's a different person
from the shy, quiet Koyumiba-san I knew before)
Uu… My stomach…
(…Huh?)
Where should I take you next?

Ah… Mio, wait a second.
I'm thirsty. Let's take a break here.
Huh…?
Ah… right!

I've been outside all this time,
so I should probably hydrate soon.
Hey, Kaori-chan.
Uh, yeah, I agree.

I'll go buy something from the vending machine.
What do you two want?
Ah… since I'm being treated, I'll buy it.
It's fine, it's fine.
I'll have a soda.

That's straightforward.
What about you, Kaori?

Ah, um…
Then, I'll have iced tea.

Understood.
Wait for me in the shade over there.
Yes!
( Kaori seems a bit tired…)
(Hey, earlier she said her stomach…)
(Maybe she's uncomfortable interacting with people?)
(No, she's an idol. She should be used to it…)
Here you go, sorry for the wait.
Thank you, Shinpei-kun.
Thank you!
Kaori, you're writing notes again?

Yes, I want to write down what I heard from Totsumura-san
before I forget.

You're really dedicated, Kaori-chan.
I'm really impressed.
No, it's not like that.

That's how it is.
Shinpei-kun, you think so too, right?
I think so too.
How do you take notes?
Ah, I think so too.
S-so, even Shinpei-kun…?

Even though the talk show is happening,
I think it's fine to have just basic knowledge.

But you're organizing it so well,
I really think you're amazing.

It's not like I'm doing something special.
I can't remember anything without taking notes.

You don't find it troublesome,
and you're still doing it?
You're really amazing.

S-so… is that how you see it?
Thank you.
How do you take notes, Kaori?
Eh… can I show you?
Yeah, if possible.
Ah, I want to see too!
It's okay… but don't expect too much.

Here you go.
You just write down what you heard
like this.
Wow, it's so neat!
Ah, and it's really easy to understand.

(Back when I was in elementary school,
the teacher also praised my notes…)

Based on these notes,
I'll introduce the good parts of the island
during the talk show.

I want everyone to fall in love
with my favorite Hitogashima Island.
That's really appreciated.
Yeah!
Hey, this notebook…?

Isn't it the same character
as the keychain you showed me before?

Yeah, that's right.
I also have a book cover and a card case…
I can't help but buy them when I see them.
You've liked them since long ago.

You remembered?!
That makes me happy.
Mm…

(Kaori… even though she seems different from before,
her core hasn't changed…)

(Though she's not really good at talking to people,
she still tried hard to gather information about the island…)

(After taking a break for a while,
we'll continue visiting various places on the island
and conduct interviews…)
(Finally, we arrived at Hitogashima Shrine.)

Of course, when it comes to Hitogashima Island,
it's the Hiruko-sama.
Yeah, the summer festival is also held here.

(Actually, I wanted to avoid coming here on the 23rd…
But the time is later than that now.
Also, this time, Mio doesn't know about the Kobayakawa family yet.)

(If I see Shiori's shadow, I probably won't chase after it…
)

(If something happens, as long as I don't go to secluded places
or dig too deep, it should be fine.)

(This time, Kaori is also here…
I need to stay alert.)

Hello, nice to meet you.
It's an unexpected combination.
Good to see you, Karikiri-san.

Hello.
Thank you very much for yesterday!
Huh, yesterday?

You participated in the live concert rehearsal,
Karikiri-san.
Ah, that's right.
I joined in the middle.

Well, since the live concert is also held here,
the shrine master was called too.
I see, so you're the one in charge of this shrine.
(That means… you came here after the funeral?)

But thinking about it, is it okay
to have a live concert at the shrine?

It's fine, fine.
The gods aren't that narrow-minded.
Also, it's all about enjoying it.
That's very Karikiri-san's way of thinking.

Actually, it was me who suggested
to the chamber of commerce to invite her for the live concert.
Huh?
You know, I was in Tokyo back then.

One day, I saw an idol from a certain production
performing outdoors surrounded by fans.

Do you know about that?
That person called "God" is the producer!

I couldn't forget that feeling,
so after returning to the island, I've been keeping an eye on that production's idols.
That's how I learned of Kaori Koyumiba, a wonderful idol—popular and island-born. So she should come…

Kaori-chan!! 
You wanted to ask Karikiri-san something, right?!

Huh, really?
What is it?

Y-yes!
Actually… I wanted to hear about the stories
related to this Hitogashima Shrine.

I thought it would be a good topic
for the talk show.

Of course, I can tell you.
Where should I start?
Ah, yes, then…

(Mio, great job!
I was about to get stuck in a long conversation…)

Thank you very much.
It was fun hearing all those stories.

I also enjoyed it,
since you were so interested.

I guess I wasn't wrong
when I introduced you to the chamber of commerce.
That makes me happy!
By the way, the live stream yesterday was great.
(Wha…?)

Kaori-chan, you did a live stream
yesterday night, right?

Yeah, it's my personal live stream channel.
I did a stream from my room
about the upcoming live concert.

Oh right, the live concert on the festival day
is also going to be streamed online.
Yeah, that's right.

I was planning to announce the URL
right before the secret live concert,
but I thought some people might miss it.

So I'm gradually hinting
that there's an event coming up
through my live stream channel.

Of course, I'm keeping it a secret
that it's happening on Hitogashima Island.

Hmm, that's interesting.
It'll probably raise the fans' expectations.

But now, maybe it's okay
to say it's happening on Hitogashima Island?

The festival is tomorrow,
and at this point, not many fans
are likely to come here.

Hah… Shinpei-kun,
you really don't get it, do you?
Huh…?

You can't be so naive!
If it's for your favorite idol,
they'll come to the island no matter what!
Huh, what?

You're being way too naive, Shinpei-kun.
If a lot of people come to the shrine,
it could lead to a big accident.
S-so, is it that big of a deal?

Of course it is.
Kaori isn't just an idol.
She's a popular idol.

According to rumors, fans who saw
the live stream yesterday already
figured out it's on Hitogashima Island.

According to rumors,
there were fans who identified it as Hitogashima Island based solely on yesterday's live stream information.
Eh…!?
Huh, you didn't know?

This morning, the official SNS of the agency had something like that written.
It seems that was posted in the comment section.

R-really?!
I'm sorry, I never thought I'd be identified!

Don't worry about it.
It'll probably only be a few people.
I'm looking forward to the live show.
Y-yes.
It seems like a live show's a lot more work than I thought.
If we had more time, there would've been ways to handle it…

This was a last-minute offer, so
the staff and the islanders
couldn't prepare perfectly…
The staff can't come to the island until tomorrow.
So that's the situation…
Yeah, this is my first time.

But I was careless.
I thought it'd be impossible to be found on Hitogashima.

In the stream, only your room and the window outside
were shown, right?

If someone could identify you from that,
that fan's just really good at it.
Don't worry about it too much.
I guess…

Right now, just focus on the live show.
Mio and I are looking forward to it.

Y-yeah… thanks.
I feel a bit better now.
Muu…

Hey, Mio.
Why are you walking so far away?
Come over here.

It's fine.
I'm keeping my distance so I don't bother you two.

Huh?
What did you say? I couldn't hear.

I said, it's fine!
It doesn't matter anyway!
…Ugh.

It's not nothing.
Since we don't know when the Shadow will come,
don't go too far from me.

W-wait, I get it.
Can you give me a little more space?
Ah, right.
…Huh.

Watching that exchange between the two of you
made me feel nostalgic.
What do you mean?

When the little Mio would step out of the group,
Shinpei would run over and pull her over here.
I think it's the same now.
S-so you remember that from long ago…

Yeah, I remember well.
Um… also…

Right, when we were in elementary school,
we sometimes walked home together with Shinpei and Mio.
At that time, Mio in front suddenly fell.
Eh, me?

Then Shinpei and Mio both ran over
to see who could pick her up first.

After that, they started fighting again
over who would carry her home.
So… what happened?

In the end, Mio didn't want to be carried,
so the three of us held hands with her in the middle
and walked home.
S-so that happened?

Ah, that sounds like something that could've happened…
I don't remember at all.

Huh… it's strange.
I have memories that no one else does.

When I was on Hitogashima…
Everything I saw seemed to sparkle.

When I came back to this island,
I felt that sparkle had returned to me.

Then I thought,
this island is really amazing…
I really like this island.
Yeah… I think we all understand that feeling.
You really do love Hitogashima, Kaori-chan.

Yeah, that's why I want to make tomorrow's event
a complete success.
I see…
…I'll help too.
Eh?
I'll help with the live show!

I don't know what I can do,
but I'll do anything.
Please don't hesitate to use me.
I'm happy, but… why all of a sudden?
After hearing that, I just couldn't stay silent.
Mio…

It's not just Mio.
I feel the same way too.

If there's anything I can do,
let me know.

That's right!
I'll help out!

Both of you…
Thank you!!
Thanks for spending time with me today.
It was really fun!
Be careful on the way home.

See you later!
See you tomorrow!

Ah!
See you tomorrow!

Well, let's head home early
for the live show tomorrow.

Ah, by the way, seeing the live rehearsal
is something I've never done before.

It's not something ordinary people see often,
so it'll probably be a good memory.
A memory…
What's wrong?

No…
It's just that story about Mio falling.

Kaori,
you remember things I don't even remember.
So Kaori-chan really…
Huh…?

So that's how it is…
She's been like that since long ago…

So what?
If you have something to say, just say it clearly.

It's nothing!
You're just too slow to catch on!
